title: Shell Type
text: Shell Type Determines the type of application that the startup shell executes. The type of shell determines the properties and triggers that you can define. Value Description APS (Windows) Application shell for a Windows application. APC (Character Mode) Application shell for a character mode application. APU (Server) Application shell for an application server. Description It is possible to specify a different value in this field, and you can compile the application shell, but it will default to a Windows application shell. Applies To Application Shells Related Links Application Shell Triggers Almost all application shells share a common set of triggers that can be used to code the behavior of the application or server when it starts.
